description: This file defines negation in the Going-to Future construction in Njo Viri (Balanda). The construction expresses planned or intended actions that will not happen.

general_principle.structure: Going-to future negation in Balanda is formed using either the negative auxiliary 'willa' or the copula-based negation 'ma ... gba'. Both patterns negate an intended future action.

negation_patterns.structure: {"willa_pattern": {"structure": "Subject + willa + tiyai + va + Verb(base) + (Object / Complement)", "constraints": ["Use 'willa' directly after the subject", "Do not add 'gba' in this pattern"]}, "ma_gba_pattern": {"structure": "Subject + ma + tiyai + va + Verb(base) + (Object / Complement) + gba", "constraints": ["Use 'ma' before 'tiyai'", "Use 'gba' sentence-finally"]}}

shared_constraints.structure: The verb 'tiyai' must remain unchanged; The connector 'va' must link to the final base verb; The final verb must remain in base form; Do not use 'le-'; Do not use 'ti-' on the final verb; Do not use 'dheki'

input: Ne willa tiyai va ja se
output: I am not going to eat fish

input: Ni willa tiyai va nzü ngo
output: She is not going to drink water

input: Danda ma tiyai va teli muru famvara gba
output: We are not going to sleep on the bed

input: Uku willa tiyai va yai
output: Uku is not going to go

input: Ngande ma tiyai va dhii ba gba
output: Ngande is not going to come home

input: Ndi willa tiyai va nonö gbi difo
output: They are not going to walk in the compound

input: Ni willa tiyai va nangele zanga
output: She is not going to run fast

input: Uku ma tiyai va mande gbi njü gba
output: Uku is not going to work in the garden

input: Wiki willa tiyai va moliki gbi difo
output: The child is not going to play in the compound

input: Ne ma tiyai va loro voro gba
output: I am not going to watch the dog

input: Ne willa tiyai va vele njo balanda
output: I am not going to speak Balanda

input: Wilii ma tiyai va sudi kavoso gba
output: The girl is not going to write words

input: Ne willa tiyai va dheke kitabu
output: I am not going to read a book

input: Ni ma tiyai va teri ay gba
output: He is not going to think about it

input: Ndi willa tiyai va ŋiyi ay
output: They are not going to know it

input: Ne ma tiyai va we ndi gba
output: I am not going to ask them

input: Ngande willa tiyai va vele zi ndi
output: Ngande is not going to tell them

input: Wilii ma tiyai va keye ti naa ni gba
output: The girl is not going to call her mother

input: Ne willa tiyai va merego ŋo
output: I am not going to love you

input: Ni ma tiyai va maguku ti kpörö gba
output: He is not going to fear the snake

input: Ni willa tiyai va sogo ni
output: She is not going to hate him

input: Ngande ma tiyai va riki ni gba
output: Ngande is not going to surprise him

input: Ni willa tiyai va dovee kurru
output: He is not going to seem calm

input: Wilii ma tiyai va yele tamma gba
output: The girl is not going to tie the shoe

input: Ni willa tiyai va di kalla
output: He is not going to cut the pot

input: Ne ma tiyai va tele njokoji gba
output: I am not going to pull the door

input: Danda willa tiyai va turu songo
output: We are not going to push the box

input: Wilii ma tiyai va soko tamma gba
output: The girl is not going to wash the shoe

input: Ne willa tiyai va kuru kavokau
output: I am not going to hide the beads

input: Ngande ma tiyai va ngö tiyi gba
output: Ngande is not going to build a house

input: Ne willa tiyai va suru kavoso
output: I am not going to create words

input: Ni ma tiyai va giri kavoso gba
output: She is not going to change the words

input: Ne willa tiyai va kara njokoji
output: I am not going to turn the door

input: Danda ma tiyai va toko villi gba
output: We are not going to add money

input: Ne willa tiyai va kefo Balanda
output: I am not going to describe Balanda

input: Ndi ma tiyai va konu nvesani gba
output: They are not going to help the poor

input: Ngande willa tiyai va ndugu mira
output: Ngande is not going to initiate the project

input: Ne ma tiyai va maforo mira gba
output: I am not going to contribute to the project

input: Wilii willa tiyai va sarwa kumere
output: The girl is not going to separate trash

input: Danda ma tiyai va kiri tidina gba
output: We are not going to uphold the law

input: Ne willa tiyai va duru ngo
output: I am not going to want water

input: Ni ma tiyai va ze villi gba
output: She is not going to give money

input: Ne willa tiyai va dhe villi
output: I am not going to find money

input: Uku ma tiyai va mele vongu gba
output: Uku is not going to try the cloth

input: Ngande willa tiyai va si ba
output: Ngande is not going to leave home

input: Ne ma tiyai va lu Wau gba
output: I am not going to arrive in Wau

input: Ni willa tiyai va fagi mva
output: He is not going to sharpen the knife

input: Ngande ma tiyai va dewe kakpodu gba
output: Ngande is not going to imitate adults

input: Danda willa tiyai va bita mira
output: We are not going to start the project

input: Ni ma tiyai va teta gba
output: He is not going to fall
